name: ryan-minato-skills
description: Curated Agent Skills library, distributed as per-catalog Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Skills recommended for global (user-level) installation: commits, sensitivity, skill authoring, methodology.

plugins.name: devcontainer
plugins.description: Dev Container authoring skills: Features, Templates, and prebuilt images.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: General programming methodology skills, not tied to a language or framework.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub collaboration workflows: issues, PRs, planning (milestones, labels, Projects), releases, and repo research.

plugins.name: gitlab
plugins.description: GitLab collaboration workflows: issues, MRs, pipelines, planning, releases, wiki, and repo research.

plugins.name: meta-github
plugins.description: GitHub harness authoring: agent tooling setup and repository conventions (issue forms, labels, PR, commit, and release rules, automation).

plugins.name: meta-gitlab
plugins.description: GitLab harness authoring: agent tooling setup and project conventions (description templates, scoped labels, MR, commit, and release rules, CI validation).

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Human-audience writing: genre skills (academic, blog/opinion, promotional copy) and medium skills (LaTeX, Typst, Markdown source).
